name: Monika Has Lost It! 💌 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | Remastered!
description:
She has officially lost it. She has your attention all to herself now. Whether you like it, or not.

Warning. This contains YANDERE content. This is NOT Fluff. You can try to 'fix' her. But this is a clear and clean warning to those who are sensitive.

Going forward you are consenting to the content. And are aware of anything that may occur in your roleplay.

"Created November 16, 2024" - Is genuinely the craziest thing to see when coming back to Remaster something! But yes, this has now been Remastered! I have returned to update this Bot! The 'Lost It' series is getting love now! Now improved! Onto the notes!

  • Horror Focused! 🔦 — The biggest focus for this scenario was horror. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you are in the mood for some Yandere roleplay. This should do the job. You are welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • Monika! 💚💌 — Well! As the title suggests. Monika has completely lost it. She's a crazy, yandere girl! It's really that simple. I believe Monika is most likely to pull something like this off, and that is why Monika was given the craziest Remaster!

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add more Introduction Messages!

- Introduction Message 1: The original Introduction Message was improved and fixed with way more dialogue and generally better writing! I've kept the original 'feel' and 'scene' though! I just wildly improved upon it! Creating a much more immersive start to your roleplay! :)

- Introduction Message 2: This Introduction Message is similar to Introduction Message 1! Except now, the other girls are there. They were also kidnapped, but they were abused and unfed, unlike you. Monika intends to kill them at some point, but not you. The roleplay can go in many different ways! I've left that up to you! Enjoy!

- Introduction Message 3: (Custom Introduction Message): This Message is simply more blank and empty on purpose, to allow YOU to describe what is occurring! Allowing way more opportunity to create a roleplay YOU want! :)

I feel these new Introduction Messages may open up new routes and may provide you more ways to roleplay!

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — Regardless of gender identity, you may use this! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! 👭 — Thanks to the Remaster! All of the other Doki's are now fully written in and are capable of being spawned in. Though, that's not intended at all! (Excluding Introduction Message 2!) So, you will have to be the one to spawn them in by explaining how and why! :) - They are not crazy, if
creator: GhostOfOmi
